description: Source list for RTO regulatory news monitoring. Sources with requires_firecrawl=true are fetched via the Firecrawl API to bypass WAF/JS-rendering issues. Others use plain curl.

sources.name: ASQA Latest News
sources.notes: Primary RTO regulator. WAF-blocked to curl, accessible via Firecrawl. Canonical news index page.

sources.name: ASQA Media Releases
sources.notes: ASQA enforcement actions and deregistrations. Highest signal for LinkedIn content.

sources.name: Skills Insight
sources.notes: Jobs and Skills Council. RSS works via curl directly.

sources.name: ITECA News
sources.notes: Independent Tertiary Education Council. Working via curl as of 2026-05-26.

sources.name: ASIC Newsroom
sources.notes: Working via underlying JSON API. Filter heavily — most ASIC news not RTO-relevant.

sources.name: TEQSA News
sources.notes: Higher ed regulator. WAF-blocked to curl, try via Firecrawl.

sources.name: DEWR Skills and Training
sources.notes: WAF-blocked to curl, try via Firecrawl.

sources.name: training.gov.au
sources.notes: JS-rendered SPA. Firecrawl renders JS, should work.
